chain.thought: Explanation: In 2008, she competed in two events (Olympic Games and World Athletics Final). In 2009, she competed in three events (World Student Games, World Championships, and World Athletics Final). Therefore, she did more in 2009.

Explanation:
The table lists her competitions by year. In 2008, there are 2 entries (Olympic Games, World Athletics Final). In 2009, there are 3 entries (World Student Games, World Championships, World Athletics Final). Therefore, she did more in 2009 than in 2008.
